content:
|Opportunity |Amount |Timeline |Likelihood |
|------------------------------------|----------------------|----------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------|
|**Ars Electronica / Mozarteum XR** |€40,000 (~$43K USD) |Awarded Oct 2025; funded Jan 2026 |Moderate (8/10 fit; 10-15% acceptance rate for category) |
|**Creative Capital** |$15,000–$30,000 |Awarded May 2026; funded June 2026|High (9/10 fit; 15-20% acceptance rate) |
|**Thoughtworks Arts** |$10,000 + tech support|Ongoing rolling admissions |Moderate (9/10 fit; limited slots) |
|**S+T+ARTS Prize** |€20,000 (~$21.5K USD) |Awarded May 2026; funded June 2026|Moderate (10/10 fit; extremely competitive; <1% acceptance)|
|**Smaller grants + residencies** |$5,000–$10,000 total |Throughout 2025–2026 |High (if we apply strategically) |
|**Fiscal sponsorship (NEA pathway)**|$30,000–$50,000 |2026+ |Medium (requires institutional setup first) |

**Realistic combined funding for 2025–2026**: $45,000–$85,000 USD / €45,000–€70,000 EUR (accounting for currency fluctuations and probability-weighted acceptance rates).
